commonPattern.modelLoadDriver: deepseek-v4-flash is rate-limited / saturated; migration spreads load to kimi-k2.6

recommendations.policy: Migrate the highest-scoring, non-critical, low-error tier-1 crons first. Defer critical or high-error crons until current run is stable.

first_batch.rationale: Weekly cadence — easy to monitor post-migration
